metadata.description: Curated Copilot agents and prompts for the Kentico team

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: AI agent for building accessible, professional UI components and layouts. Includes a /create-ui-component prompt for generating new components from a description.

plugins.name: security-checks
plugins.description: AI agent for auditing code against the OWASP Top 10 and common security vulnerabilities. Includes a /security-audit prompt for on-demand scanning of files or features.
